Usage Guidelines

Do

Maintain clear space around the icon equal to at least the width of the core diamond. Use the full-color version on dark backgrounds whenever possible.

Do

Use the monochrome variant when the logo appears alongside other brand marks or on colored backgrounds where the gradient may clash.

Don't

Rotate, skew, or distort the isometric perspective. The 30° viewing angle is integral to the identity.

Don't

Place the full-color logo on busy photographic backgrounds or mid-tone surfaces that reduce contrast.

Agent Kernel Logo System — Stack Concept
